ab: tucu a qadaw pitju a milingan djemaljun a ken i gaku.
en: I arrived at school at seven today.

ab: patagilj anga, kitulu mangetjez anga ti sinsi qivu ti pangcang, “gacalji! drequngi!”
ch: 上課了，老師走進教室，班長說:「起立!敬禮!」
en: It’s time for class , the teacher walked into the classroom, and the monitor said: “Stand up! Salute!”

ab: pasi qaca men a qivu, “nanguanguaq sun sinsi.”
tazua nu kitulutulu, tuluan a amen ni sinsi ta pinayuanan a sasupuan.
ch: 上課的時候，老師教我們數字的族語。
en: In class, the teacher taught us the paiwan language of numbers.

ab: kiciur a men ta sinsi a semupu, semenay a men ta sasupuan a senay.
ch: 我們跟著老師唸，我們唱了數字歌。
en: We followed the teacher to read, we sang the number song.

ab: liyaw a ku kinitulu ta kay a pinayuanan.
en: I have learned many paiwan languages.

ab: ljemita ta qadaw a ken a sema gaku, ljemita ta qadaw a ken a itulu tua pinayuanan, uri ikay a ken a palangeda tjaikina.
ch: 我天天上學，我天天學族語，我要講給媽媽聽。
en: I go to school every day, I learn the paiwan language every day, and I want to tell my mother.
